subject: Sports
title: The Flu Game
description: A quick, practical guide to The Flu Game.

hook.text: Michael Jordan could barely stand. He played anyway and won one of the most famous games in NBA history.

buildup.text: Game 5 of the 1997 NBA Finals. Jordan woke up with severe flu-like symptoms and a high fever.

discovery.text: Despite being visibly ill, he scored 38 points, including a crucial three-pointer late in the game.

twist.text: His personal trainer later claimed it was food poisoning from a late-night pizza delivery, not the flu.

climax.text: Jordan collapsed into Scottie Pippen's arms after the buzzer. The Bulls won and took a 3-2 series lead.

punchline.text: Too sick to walk. Not too sick to win.

quiz.question: How many points did Jordan score in the Flu Game?
